name: Lemon Cheesecake
description: A no-bake lemon cheesecake on a digestive biscuit base. Set in the fridge; can be frozen.

ingredients.name: soft cheese
ingredients.notes: full or half-fat, e.g. Philadelphia; 8 oz

steps.title: Make the base
steps.content: Melt {0001}. Stir in {0002} and line the base of a tin or flan dish. Leave to cool.

steps.title: Combine condensed milk and cream
steps.content: Combine {0004} and {0005} in a bowl or jug, then add gradually to the cheese. The mixture will be quite runny.

steps.title: Add the lemon
steps.content: Add the grated rind and then the juice from {0006}.

steps.title: Pour and chill
steps.content: Pour the mixture onto the base. Smooth the top and refrigerate until set.

notes: This can be frozen. Original cook's note: vary quantities for different numbers of diners and make the day before it's needed. As a guide, to serve 6–8 people use 10 digestives, 2–3 oz butter, and 3 or 4 large lemons.
